calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc. Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook Collection Attorneys for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
